<noinclude>
This is a list of [[workshops]] that are scheduled for the future.
The main content of this page are automatically transcluded into the Workshops page and also the front page of the wiki.
</noinclude>

== March 2026 ==

=== Linux Workshop for Beginners ===
* 7, 14, and 21 March 2026
* a multi-day workshop, 3 Saturdays in a row
* Liberate your computer and your self from Windows or MacOS!
* more info on the [[Linux Workshop for Beginners]] wiki page

<noinclude>
[[Main Page#Stay informed|'''Follow us''']] to get announcements for upcoming workshops.
</noinclude>
